_comments.urlList: Defines HTTPS urls that are to be tested against. The script expects port 443 to be used in the testing, so HTTPS is required.
_comments.count: Defines the number of times to test each url for invoke-webrequests, the script times the reponse times to determine an extimated latency for connectivity to the site
_comments.responseTimeout: Defines the timeout for the invoke-webrequest command
_comments.startMtuSize: Defines the starting MTU size for the ping -f -l command in the script, this will increment by 10 until the packet hits fragmentation.
_comments.myIpSite: Defines the site to use to determine the public IP address of the client running the script
_comments.skipTracertTest: Defines whether or not to skip the tracert test
_comments.tracertCount: Defines the number of hops to test in the tracert test
_comments.skipTestNetconnection: Defines whether or not to skip the test-netconnection test
_comments.skipResponseTimeTest: Defines whether or not to skip the invoke-webrequest test
_comments.skipNslookupTest: Defines whether or not to skip the nslookup test
_comments.skipUploadFile: Defines whether or not to skip the file upload to a storage blob
_comments.skipMtuSizeTest: Defines whether or not to skip the MTU size test
_comments.sasUrl: Defines the SAS URL for the storage blob to upload the file into
